NOAIS element allowlist test

This page tests that the NOAIS_ELEMENT_ALLOWLIST module loads and registers itself. The module logs "[NOAIS] NOAIS_ELEMENT_ALLOWLIST module ready" from its IIFE when the content script runs.

The manifest content_scripts entries for page-counter.js, badge-tooltip.js, and element-allowlist.js are verified via jq in the calling test script.
